programme.title: Pourquoi moi ?
programme.desc: Le documentaire "Pourquoi moi ?", réalisé par la cellule reportage de beIN SPORTS, permet de comprendre la mentalité des plus grands champions. Comment fonctionne leur cerveau ? programme.title: Ça se passe sur beIN SPORTS
Le Rêve d'une vie
programme.desc: En 2025, le Serbe Novak Djokovic s'apprête à disputer Wimbledon pour la 20ème fois. Son rêve d'enfant était de soulever le trophée, il va y parvenir à 7 reprises. "Le Rêve d'une vie" raconte l'histoire d'un garçon né en ex-Yougoslavie qui découvre le gazon en 2005, et qui va y prendre goût au point d'en déguster quelques brins d'herbe à chaque victoire finale.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Coventry/Man Utd 1997

programme.title: PL Greatest:Everton/Wimbledon 1994
programme.desc: Everton: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Everton, the 3-2 win over Wimbledon in 1994 that ensured the Toffees' survival.

programme.title: PL Greatest: Man City/Fulham 2008
programme.desc: Fulham: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Fulham, the 3-2 fightback at Man City in 2008 that ignited their survival run.

programme.title: PL Greatest: M'boro/Man City 2008
programme.desc: Middlesbrough: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 49 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for Middlesbrough, the 8-1 hammering of Man City back in May 2008.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: In a career spanning 20 years, Petr Cech established himself as one of the greatest goalkeepers the game has ever seen. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the four-time Premier League champion to reflect on his playing career and the mentality it takes to be a goalkeeper at the very pinnacle of world football. programme.title: PL MOMENTS
programme.desc: Over a nine season spell in the Premier League, Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink etched his name into footballing folklore as one of the most dynamic goalscorers in the competition's history. Fourth all time in Premier League goals for Chelsea, Hasselbaink's iconic freekicks and powerful finishes have seen him score some of the League's most memorable goals.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Edwin van der Sar has faced down pressure on the biggest stages in world football, but his toughest battle came after retirement. In 2023, the legendary goalkeeper suffered a life-threatening brain haemorrhage. In this episode Edwin opens up on his recovery and looks back on his career at the top that redefined goalkeeping.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: Three decades on from Manchester United's iconic Class of '92, PL Stories steps beyond the headline names to rediscover the teammates who shared the same dressing room, dreams, and demands of one of football's most revered youth systems.
